subject: Behavioral health

extras.impact_clause: An act to amend Section 1799.111 of the Health and Safety Code, and to amend Sections 5008, 5350, 5354, and 5402 of, and to add Section 5122 to, the Welfare and Institutions Code, relating to mental health.

results.latest_action_description: Chaptered by Secretary of State. Chapter 637, Statutes of 2023.
